topic: Building a Deep Research Agent on a Billion-Scale RAG System for Financial Intelligence: Multi-Step Autonomous Research over Earnings Transcripts, SEC Filings and Analyst Reports on GCP
question_text: How would you design a multi-step autonomous research agent on GCP, integrating billion-scale RAG for financial intelligence across earnings transcripts, SEC filings, and analyst reports to provide actionable insights with Gemini 3.1 Pro and Vertex AI Agent Engine?
hook_text: Unlock financial secrets! Build a billion-scale RAG agent for deep market intelligence on GCP. Analyze filings, transcripts, and reports autonomously.
cta_text: Master Gen AI finance: Follow for expert architect insights!

answer_sections.title: Data Ingestion & Indexing Pipeline
answer_sections.text:
Financial data from Cloud Storage.
Dataflow transforms and chunks.
Gemini 3.1 Flash embeds.
Vertex AI Vector Search for billion-scale RAG.
answer_sections.spoken_audio: Financial data ingested, transformed, embedded with Gemini 3.1 Flash Image. Indexed into Vertex AI Vector Search for efficient billion-scale retrieval.

answer_sections.title: Autonomous Agent Orchestration
answer_sections.text:
Vertex AI Agent Engine orchestrates research.
Gemini 3.1 Pro reasons, retrieves context.
Refines queries, synthesizes validated financial insights.
answer_sections.spoken_audio: Vertex AI Agent Engine orchestrates multi-step research. Gemini 3.1 Pro powers reasoning, iteratively refining queries, and synthesizing validated financial insights.

answer_sections.title: Insight Delivery & Observability
answer_sections.text:
Insights published to BigQuery, triggering alerts.
Cloud Monitoring tracks performance.
Security Command Center for governance.
Vertex AI Evaluation confirms quality.
answer_sections.spoken_audio: Insights published to BigQuery, triggering alerts. Cloud Monitoring tracks agent performance and utilization. Security Command Center ensures data governance.

diagrams.title: Data Flow
diagrams.dsl: (Source Docs: Cloud Storage) -> [Event Trigger: Pub/Sub] -> [Transformation: Dataflow] -> [Embedding Gen: Gemini 3.1 Flash Image] -> [[Vector Index: Vertex AI Vector Search]]
animation_sequence: Vector Index: Vertex AI Vector Search

diagrams.title: Agent Workflow
diagrams.dsl: (User Query) -> [Agent Orchestrator: Vertex AI Agent Engine] -> (Reasoning: Gemini 3.1 Pro) -> {RAG Loop} -> [[Vector Search]] -> (Synthesize Output)
animation_sequence: Agent Orchestrator: Vertex AI Agent Engine

diagrams.title: Delivery & Ops
diagrams.dsl: (Synthesized Output) -> [[Insight Store: BigQuery]] -> (Alerting) -> [Monitoring: Cloud Monitoring] -> [Logging: Cloud Logging] -> {Data Governance: Security Command Center?}
